allow: Bash(php -r "echo extension_loaded\('exif'\) ? 'EXIF: loaded OK' : 'EXIF: still not loaded';")

PowerShell(php artisan tinker --execute="echo 'regions.base_fee: '.\(\\Schema::hasColumn\('regions','base_fee'\)?'true':'false'\).PHP_EOL; echo 'orders.pickup_geofence_confirmed_at: '.\(\\Schema::hasColumn\('orders','pickup_geofence_confirmed_at'\)?'true':'false'\).PHP_EOL; echo 'driver_presence_logs table: '.\(\\Schema::hasTable\('driver_presence_logs'\)?'true':'false'\).PHP_EOL;")
